text:
A long time ago in a small village nobody talked much. It was a hard life. But it wasn't boring.

One evening the moon climbed high above the fields. A girl from a neighbouring town noticed it. She remembered stories.

One evening a boy climbed atop a haystack. He stared.

Then she told herself, maybe tomorrow. Why today?

Tomorrow morning. She jumped.

Today.

She walked. Night fell. So soft.

A whisper.

A tiny.

She felt.

Light.

Stars glisten.

A gentle breeze.

Sweet.

She sang.

Moonlight.



She stopped.

Birdsong.

Drowsy.

Sleep.

She dreamed.

A river. Wildflowers. Bright stars.

She smiled.

A soft thing.

Dreamcatcher?

Something.

Silent.

She woke.

Nothing changed. But felt.
